Our services

Six disciplines, one practice.

Each service is delivered through a personal adviser relationship — supported by our research, compliance, and administration teams.

I
Personal wealth management and financial planning

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment
II
Self-managed superannuation fund administration

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment
III
Corporate advisory and M&A support

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment
IV
Residential and commercial lending

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment
V
Risk insurance and estate planning

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment
VI
Mining executive remuneration and equity planning

Personal adviser relationship with quarterly portfolio review meetings, annual strategy review, and ad-hoc consultation as your circumstances change.

By appointment

How we work

Three commitments.

Process matters as much as judgment. These commitments shape every engagement we accept.

I

Personal advice.

Commitment 01

Every client has a named adviser. We do not rotate accounts and we do not hand you to a junior. The person you meet is the person responsible.

II

Conflict-free.

Commitment 02

Our advisers are paid on salary plus practice profit — never on product commissions. Recommendations follow your interests, not ours.

III

Documented in writing.

Commitment 03

Every recommendation is captured in a Statement of Advice, with the reasoning, the alternatives considered, and the costs disclosed. You keep a copy.

Southern Cross Financial

A boutique Western Australian wealth management and advisory firm. Personal advice for individuals, families, and business owners since 2011.
